q: Are there tall buildings near your home?
examiner_note: Giám khảo muốn nghe mô tả về môi trường sống xung quanh bạn. Bạn có thể nói về mật độ xây dựng (construction density) và cảm giác khi sống gần những tòa nhà cao tầng. Hãy sử dụng các danh từ chỉ loại hình tòa nhà (skyscrapers, high-rises, residential complexes) và các tính từ mô tả sự hiện đại hoặc chật chội. Nếu không có nhà cao tầng, bạn có thể nói về sự yên tĩnh của khu phố mình đang sống.

band7.text: Yes, there are quite a few high-rises in my neighborhood. They are mostly luxury apartment blocks and office buildings. While they look modern and impressive, it sometimes feels a bit crowded and limits the natural light in the area.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp và nêu được đặc điểm của các tòa nhà (high-rises, apartment blocks). Có sự nhận xét cá nhân hợp lý.

band8.text: In recent years, my area has seen a surge in urban development, so we’re now surrounded by several towering skyscrapers. Most of them are residential complexes equipped with modern amenities. I must admit, I appreciate the convenience they bring, but the sheer density of these structures can feel a bit overwhelming at times.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao và diễn đạt tự nhiên (surge in urban development, towering skyscrapers, residential complexes, amenities, sheer density, overwhelming).

band9.text: My local vicinity has undergone a dramatic transformation, and is now dominated by colossal skyscrapers and sprawling high-rise developments. These contemporary structures certainly exemplify the city's rapid economic growth; however, their imposing presence often obscures the skyline and contributes to a sense of urban claustrophobia. While the architectural ingenuity is impressive, I occasionally find myself longing for the more open, traditional layouts of the past.
band9.note: Từ vựng cực kỳ phong phú và chính xác (vicinity, dramatic transformation, dominated, colossal, contemporary, exemplify, imposing, obscures, urban claustrophobia, architectural ingenuity). Cách lập luận đa chiều và tinh tế.

v.example: More and more high-rises are being built in the city center.

v.meaning: khu dân cư/tổ hợp nhà ở
v.example: The new residential complex includes a gym, a pool, and a park.
Urban development has changed the face of the city over the last decade.

v.meaning: tòa nhà chọc trời cao ngất
v.example: The city is famous for its towering skyscrapers and modern architecture.
The hotel offers a wide range of amenities for its guests.
The high population density makes the city very crowded.
The sheer number of people in the square was overwhelming.
There are no good schools in the immediate vicinity of our house.
Technology has brought about a dramatic transformation in our lives.
The statue is a colossal achievement of art and engineering.
I prefer contemporary furniture to traditional styles.

v.meaning: minh họa cho/lấy làm ví dụ cho
v.example: Her career exemplifies the success that hard work can bring.

v.meaning: uy nghi/ấn tượng (thường do kích thước)
v.example: The cathedral is a very imposing building.
New developments often obscure the skyline and block natural light.

v.meaning: cảm giác ngột ngạt nơi đô thị
v.example: Living in a tiny apartment in the city gave him urban claustrophobia.

v.meaning: sự khéo léo/sáng tạo trong kiến trúc
v.example: The bridge is a masterpiece of architectural ingenuity.

v.meaning: mong mỏi/khát khao cái gì đó
v.example: After a year abroad, I was longing for some home-cooked food.
He lives on the tenth floor of a modern apartment block.
Many old houses were demolished to build office buildings.
Keep out of the construction site; it's dangerous.

v.meaning: rừng bê tông (thành phố đầy nhà cao tầng)
v.example: Sometimes I just want to escape this concrete jungle and go to a forest.

v.meaning: khu vực có mật độ xây dựng cao
v.example: Speed limits are lower in built-up areas for safety.
The city needs better infrastructure to handle the growing population.
The historic building has a beautiful marble facade.
The Eiffel Tower is a global landmark.
The commercial district is very busy during office hours.

v.meaning: tòa nhà đa năng (văn phòng + nhà ở + mua sắm)
v.example: Living in a mixed-use building is very convenient.
The workers were standing on scaffolding to paint the wall.
The architect is working on the final blueprints for the house.

v.meaning: sự lôi cuốn về mặt thẩm mỹ
v.example: Modern architecture often prioritizes function over aesthetic appeal.
Building the pyramids was a monumental task for the ancient Egyptians.
More architects are now using sustainable design to save energy.

v.meaning: sự toàn vẹn/vững chắc của cấu trúc
v.example: The engineers checked the structural integrity of the bridge after the earthquake.
Our house is currently undergoing renovation.
The old factory was left in a dilapidated condition.
New York is a very cosmopolitan city.
Traffic congestion is a major problem in many large cities.

v.meaning: đường chân trời (hình dáng thành phố)
v.example: The Dubai skyline is famous for the Burj Khalifa.
From the observation deck, we could see for miles.
The sprawling suburbs continue to grow every year.
The organization felt like a monolithic and unchanging force.
Rapid urbanization is leading to many social challenges.

v.meaning: thứ chướng mắt (toà nhà xấu xí)
v.example: That half-finished concrete building is a real eyesore.
The metropolitan area includes several smaller towns.

v.meaning: bảo tồn di tích lịch sử
v.example: The city council is dedicated to historic preservation.
The cost of utilities is included in the rent.

v.meaning: sự cải thiện khu phố (đi kèm giá cả tăng)
v.example: Gentrification often forces local residents to move out.
We stopped to admire the beautiful mountain landscape.
The shimmering glass windows reflected the afternoon sun.

v.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị cản trở
v.example: The hotel room offers an uninterrupted view of the beach.
